description_long: This is a realistic model of a crab, featuring a broad, dark brown carapace with subtle orange and reddish hues along the edges and joints. The crab has two prominent claws, with the left claw being significantly larger and more robust than the right, both displaying a gradient from dark brown to a lighter, almost bluish-gray at the tips. Its legs are slender, jointed, and splayed outward, showing a mix of brown and orange coloration, with visible segmentation and pointed tips. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. The underside and joints of the legs reveal lighter, more muted tones, suggesting a naturalistic texture. The overall surface appears hard and slightly rough, typical of a crab's exoskeleton.
description: A lifelike crab with a broad, dark brown carapace, one oversized claw, and segmented, jointed legs with orange and brown hues.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, both claws (left much larger), and eyes on stalks at the carapace's corners.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the oversized left claw and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and the back of the carapace.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the smaller right claw and the curvature of the body and legs.
